overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city. The player moves from a dark neon-lit indoor market through a transitional underpass into bright sunlit streets with palm trees and Asian-inspired architecture, eventually ascending to an elevated industrial plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark neon-lit indoor market corridor with holographic advertisements

events.description: bright light from exit becomes visible at the end of the dark corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dimly lit covered market area with glowing neon ads on the walls

entered.detail: large glowing holographic advertisement displaying colorful graphics on the left wall
wooden counter with goods in the center of the walkway
thick structural support column with rough concrete texture
large floating holographic sign with bright neon colors

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, enclosed market corridor illuminated by vibrant neon holographic advertisements. The player moves forward through the narrow space past concrete pillars and scattered debris, approaching a bright exit visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional walkway under overpass approaching street level

events.description: exits the covered indoor market into a semi-covered overpass area
ascending stairs into bright natural sunlight from the dark underpass

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs from the dark underpass into bright outdoor light

entered.detail: concrete stairs leading upward toward the bright street exit
massive concrete overpass beams and supports overhead
traditional red Japanese torii gate structure visible ahead
tall palm trees silhouetted against the bright sky

segments.scene_description: The player transitions from the dark indoor market to a semi-covered overpass area, ascending concrete stairs toward bright sunlight. The environment shifts from artificial neon lighting to natural daylight, revealing palm trees and a red torii gate structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban street with palm trees and Asian-inspired architecture

events.description: emerges from underpass onto bright sunlit city street
futuristic armored vehicle drives past on the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit sidewalk past palm trees and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic armored vehicle driving along the street

entered.detail: white and black armored futuristic vehicle with glowing blue lights
large green glowing holographic advertisement floating above street level
colorful painted benches with NPCs sitting along the sidewalk
tall curved building with glass facade and futuristic design

segments.scene_description: Emerging into bright sunlight, the player walks along a futuristic city street lined with palm trees and a prominent red torii gate. An armored vehicle passes by on the road, while pedestrians walk along the tiled sidewalk near colorful benches and large holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian street with seating areas and digital advertisements

events.description: passing by group of NPCs sitting on public benches

agents.ego_description: continuing along the street past seated NPCs and large digital billboards

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs sitting and conversing on painted benches

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs leading up to an elevated plaza area
large industrial building with distinctive teal green facade and signage
vertical digital screen displaying portrait advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player continues along the pedestrian street, passing NPCs relaxing on colorful benches near large digital billboards. The street opens up to reveal stairs leading to an elevated plaza, with a distinctive teal industrial building visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza with industrial teal buildings and staircases

events.description: ascending wide stairs toward the elevated plaza level
reaching the top of stairs entering the industrial plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking up stairs into an elevated plaza area with industrial architecture

notable_agents.action: NPC in orange jacket walking up the stairs ahead

entered.detail: open concrete plaza area at the top of the stairs
large cylindrical industrial tanks and pipe structures

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player ascending wide concrete stairs to an elevated plaza dominated by a distinctive teal industrial building with visible piping and ventilation equipment. Other pedestrians are seen walking up and down the stairs as the player reaches the plaza level with concrete planters and industrial architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dark, neon-lit indoor market into a bright, sun-drenched futuristic city plaza. It begins in a narrow, enclosed corridor filled with vibrant holographic advertisements and concrete pillars, moving steadily toward a distant light. As the camera ascends concrete stairs, the artificial neon glow gives way to natural daylight within a semi-covered overpass, revealing palm trees and a red torii gate. The scene then opens onto a bustling city street where an armored vehicle passes by and pedestrians lounge near colorful benches and digital billboards. Finally, the path leads up a wide set of stairs to an elevated industrial plaza dominated by a teal building with exposed piping and ventilation equipment.
